When a character attempts to do something with their physical or mental abilities, the DM might call for an ability check. The player then rolls a d20 and adds the relevant ability modifier (Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma). If the total equals or exceeds the DC, the character succeeds; otherwise, they fail.

A 5-foot.diameter sphere of flame appears in an unoccupied space of your choice within range and lasts for duration. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 2d6 fire damage. As a bonus action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space. Each adjacent creature must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 7d10 fire damage.
